{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Secretary",
  "description": "Zimah Eye Care Limited is a highly rated, professional eye care center primarily located in Gwarinpa Estate, Abuja, Nigeria. They are well-known for providing comprehensive optometric care with modern diagnostic technology.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Gwarinpa, Abuja (FCT)
Working Hours: Monday - Friday: 8:00am - 6:00pm, Saturday: 9:00am - 9:00pm

Responsibilities


	Manage front desk and attend to clients professionally
	Handle calls, mails and general inquiries
	Maintain record and files
	Provide administrative support to the team
	Ensure smooth daily operations


Requirements


	Smart and presentable
	Good communication skills
	Proficient in Computer (MS Word, Excel, Email &amp; Internet).


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 / Month (Depending on experience).

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: zimaheyecare@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For More enquiries, call: 08050767588.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-17",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-18",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

Secretary Job at Zimah Eye Care Limited




        
    

        
        Zimah Eye Care Limited is a highly rated, professional eye care center primarily located in Gwarinpa Estate, Abuja, Nigeria. They are well-known for providing comprehensive optometric care with modern diagnostic technology.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Gwarinpa, Abuja (FCT)
Working Hours: Monday - Friday: 8:00am - 6:00pm, Saturday: 9:00am - 9:00pm

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Manage front desk and attend to clients professionally
	Handle calls, mails and general inquiries
	Maintain record and files
	Provide administrative support to the team
	Ensure smooth daily operations


Requirements


	Smart and presentable
	Good communication skills
	Proficient in Computer (MS Word, Excel, Email & Internet).


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 / Month (Depending on experience).

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For More enquiries, call: 08050767588.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Clerk
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Account Officer Job at Dr. Peter Odili Specialist Cancer & Cardiovascular Hospital (POCCH)




        
    

        
        Dr. Peter Odili Specialist Cancer & Cardiovascular Hospital (POCCH) is a leading tertiary healthcare institution located in Port Harcourt, dedicated to delivering advanced and compassionate medical care at international standards.

Our hospital specializes in oncology (cancer care), cardiovascular medicine, renal (kidney) care, advanced surgery, and precision diagnostics, all under one roof.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Requirement


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Benefits

Inventory Coordinator Job at Dr. Peter Odili Specialist Cancer & Cardiovascular Hospital (POCCH)




        
    

        
        Dr. Peter Odili Specialist Cancer & Cardiovascular Hospital (POCCH) is a leading tertiary healthcare institution located in Port Harcourt, dedicated to delivering advanced and compassionate medical care at international standards.

Our hospital specializes in oncology (cancer care), cardiovascular medicine, renal (kidney) care, advanced surgery, and precision diagnostics, all under one roof.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Coordinator

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Requirement
     

            
    




	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Benefits


	Competitive Salary & Benefits
	Toxic-free
	Employee-centered
	Performance-based.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
